At a glance

  • Current: Global Service Experience Lead, GE HealthCare (Jan 2024-Present)
  • Experience: 12+ years, GE HealthCare, General Electric, HCLTech, Dell
  • Expertise: ServiceNow HRSD, Workday, Agentic AI, chatbots/NLP, knowledge management, HR shared services
  • Signature results: 84% reduction in unresolved chatbot utterances; 74% fewer annual-enrollment inquiries
  • Certifications: PRINCE2 Agile Practitioner, CSM, ITIL, Six Sigma, ServiceNow Micro-Certification
  • Education: B.Tech, Information Technology, Lovely Professional University
